articles.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures rise as AI trade takes center stage
The $600/month Medicare mistake too many 65-year-old retirees make. Don’t fall for the same trap
Nuvalent shares surge 39% after UK's GSK agrees to buy the cancer drugmaker for $10.6 billion
articles.summary: The deal comes at a time of biotech dealmaking frenzy, driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets and drugmakers' race to bolster pipelines.

articles.summary: Apple's artificial intelligence strategy took center stage at its Worldwide Developers Conference in Cupertino, Calif.

51% of U.S. adults say the American Dream is out of reach for most people right now: CNBC survey
articles.summary: In an exclusive CNBC survey, 81% of respondents said the cost of living is their biggest financial hurdle to achieving the American Dream.

articles.title: AI、货币政策与格林斯潘的1996（中）
articles.summary: 陈稻田：AI总体上趋于导致工资增速的下降、劳动收入份额的下降，这和流行的“K型”经济假说相一致。AI对失业率的影响则有正有负，如何看待其冲击？

articles.title: SpaceX's stock market blast-off could be Musk's biggest gamble yet
articles.summary: SpaceX is preparing for a stock market debut that could transform the company, the wider market and Elon Musk's fortune.

articles.title: Driving test booking rules tightened after thousands of no shows
articles.summary: Learner drivers can only swap their test to the three centres nearest to their original booking.

articles.title: I’m 60, retired with $3 million. My fiancée, 55, has $1 million but plans to work for the next 10 years. Are we compatible?
articles.summary: “Although she is quite frugal, she has not been particularly diligent with investing.”

articles.title: 崇高美学之追寻：纪念袁运生
articles.summary: 赵寻：指出袁对崇高之美的情有独钟与毕生追寻，将使他绘画中的世界主义倾向更早被人发现，更将使他对中国艺术传统的运用不至于被国家主义利用。

articles.title: 如何理解国民党主席郑丽文在两岸问题上的新言论？
articles.summary: 林原：郑丽文试图在国际社会塑造“和平维护者”“和平巩固者”形象。她访美也旨在说明国民党“维护台海和平、支持区域稳定”等立场。

manual_checklist: 确认 Markdown 报告不是简单复述新闻，而是有清晰结论提炼。
确认没有把新闻中的旧行情数字包装成“基于实时数据”或“现价”。
确认没有把同比、环比、财报增速写成当前实时涨跌。
确认 Judgment Cards 区分了事实、推断、风险。
确认观察项承接了证据不足内容，而不是强行输出确定性结论。
确认建议具有跟踪价值，不是模板化、空泛表述。
确认股票推荐评分章节包含总分、子分、等级、数据完整度与失效条件。
